projects.title: Feedback and Billing System
projects.description: Comprehensive snack shop billing system with tax calculation, star ratings, and file storage
projects.longDescription: A complete C++ application for snack shop management. Features include automatic bill generation, tax calculation (CGST/SGST), customer feedback with star ratings, and persistent file storage for transaction history. The system maintains inventory, generates daily reports, and provides analytics on popular items.
features: Automatic bill generation with unique IDs
Inventory management with low stock alerts
Daily, weekly, and monthly sales reports

projects.title: bis-smart-compliance
projects.description: Smart compliance system built with Python for automated monitoring and reporting
projects.longDescription: A Python-based compliance monitoring system that automates the checking of regulatory requirements. Includes report generation, data validation, and audit logging capabilities. The system can monitor multiple compliance standards simultaneously and provides real-time alerts for violations.
features: Automated compliance checks for multiple standards

projects.title: Railway Reservation System
projects.description: Console-based railway ticket reservation system with seat management
projects.longDescription: A comprehensive railway reservation system built in C++ that handles ticket booking, cancellation, seat availability tracking, and PNR status management. The system supports multiple train types, classes, and fare calculations with dynamic pricing.
features: PNR status tracking with SMS simulation
Dynamic fare calculation based on demand

projects.title: Advanced Portfolio Website
projects.description: Futuristic portfolio with 3D elements, AI chatbot, and private cloud storage
projects.longDescription: A cutting-edge portfolio website featuring 3D backgrounds, AI-powered chatbot, voice navigation, and a secure private cloud for certificate storage. Built with modern web technologies including Three.js for 3D graphics, IndexedDB for client-side storage, and PWA capabilities for offline access.
features: AI chatbot trained on personal data

projects.title: Machine Learning Basics
projects.description: Collection of ML algorithms implemented from scratch for learning purposes
projects.longDescription: A learning project implementing fundamental machine learning algorithms from scratch using Python and NumPy. Includes linear regression, logistic regression, k-nearest neighbors, and neural networks. Each algorithm comes with detailed documentation and visualization of results.
features: KNN classifier with multiple distance metrics

projects.title: Smart Attendance System
projects.description: Face recognition based attendance system using OpenCV and Python
projects.longDescription: An automated attendance system that uses facial recognition to mark student attendance. The system captures faces, trains a recognition model, and marks attendance in real-time with timestamp and location data.
